title: Gado Gado - Indonesian Peanut Salad
steps: Crushed garlic and mixed with peanut butter
Add lime juice and sweeet soy sauce

title: $2 Peanut Butter Noodles
steps: Crushed Garlic then mixed with peanut butter

title: $2 Pistachio Ham Ramen
steps: Boil the bok choy in water with beef broth
Sauce: Mix soy sauce with sugar and crushed garlic. Add water if it's too salty
Cut the red pepper in strips or as desire
Cut the ham into bite size
Remove the bok choy and noodles from the stove once cooked, drain the water or keep the broth if you like your ramen soupy
Place the noodles and bok choy in a bowl, then pour the sauce on top
Add the red peppers, ham, and crushed pistachios on top of the noodles
